parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_readings,
  ROUND(AVG(reading)::numeric, 4) as avg_kwh,
  ROUND(MAX(reading)::numeric, 4) as max_kwh,
  ROUND(MIN(reading)::numeric, 4) as min_kwh,
  ROUND(STDDEV(reading)::numeric, 4) as stddev_kwh,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN severity != 'Normal' THEN 1 END) as anomaly_count,
  MAX(timestamp) as last_reading
FROM energy_history
WHERE area = '{{ $json.body.area || $json.area }}'
  AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';

SELECT
  date_trunc('hour', timestamp) as hora,
  ROUND(AVG(reading)::numeric, 4) as avg_kwh,
  COUNT(*) as lecturas,
  MAX(severity) as peor_estado
FROM energy_history
WHERE area = '{{ $('Webhook Diagnóstico').first().json.body.area || $('Webhook Diagnóstico').first().json.area }}'
  AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY hora
ORDER BY hora;

SELECT id, severidad, valor_kwh, ema_kwh, desviacion,
  to_char(timestamp, 'HH24:MI') as hora
FROM anomalias
WHERE area = '{{ $('Webhook Diagnóstico').first().json.body.area || $('Webhook Diagnóstico').first().json.area }}'
  AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 10;

INSERT INTO agent_decisions (agent_name, decision_type, area, input_data, output_data, action_taken)
VALUES ('diagnosis', $1, $2, $3, $4, 'diagnosis_complete');

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.pattern_type, $json.area, JSON.stringify({kwh: $('Webhook Diagnóstico').first().json.body?.kwh || $('Webhook Diagnóstico').first().json.kwh, severity: $json.severity}), JSON.stringify({pattern: $json.pattern_type, anomalies: $json.recent_anomalies_count, recurring: $json.is_recurring})] }}
